content.json:
# 🗂️ Claims GenAI Tracing Workbook
Claim-first observability for the insurance claims agents across **traces**, **requests**, and **dependencies**. Use the time range selector to scope every panel below.

This workbook tracks the `claims-triage-agent` and `claims-decision-agent` as they triage and decide claims `CLM-001`–`CLM-005`.

content.query: let base = union isfuzzy=true traces, requests, dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend Payload = strcat(tostring(message), ' ', tostring(name), ' ', tostring(target), ' ', tostring(data), ' ', tostring(customDimensions)) | extend ClaimId = extract(@'(CLM-\d{3})', 1, Payload), AgentName = extract(@'(claims-triage-agent|claims-decision-agent|tracing-test-agent)', 1, Payload) | where isnotempty(ClaimId) or isnotempty(AgentName); base | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = 'Total Traces', Order = 0 | union (base | summarize Value = dcountif(AgentName, isnotempty(AgentName)) | extend Metric = 'Agents Active', Order = 1) | union (base | summarize Value = dcountif(ClaimId, isnotempty(ClaimId)) | extend Metric = 'Claims Seen', Order = 2) | union (base | summarize Value = dcount(operation_Id) | extend Metric = 'Operations', Order = 3) | order by Order asc | project Metric, Value

content.json:
## Agent KPIs
Invocations, distinct operations, latency, and token usage per agent.

content.query: union isfuzzy=true traces, requests, dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend Payload = strcat(tostring(message), ' ', tostring(name), ' ', tostring(target), ' ', tostring(data), ' ', tostring(customDimensions)) | extend AgentName = extract(@'(claims-triage-agent|claims-decision-agent|tracing-test-agent)', 1, Payload) | where isnotempty(AgentName) | extend DurationMs = todouble(column_ifexists('duration', real(null))) | extend InputTokens = toint(coalesce(customDimensions['gen_ai.usage.input_tokens'], customDimensions['gen_ai.usage.prompt_tokens'])) | extend OutputTokens = toint(coalesce(customDimensions['gen_ai.usage.output_tokens'], customDimensions['gen_ai.usage.completion_tokens'])) | summarize Invocations = count(), Operations = dcount(operation_Id), AvgDurationMs = round(avg(DurationMs), 1), InputTokens = sum(InputTokens), OutputTokens = sum(OutputTokens), LastSeen = max(timestamp) by AgentName | order by Invocations desc

dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend Payload = strcat(tostring(name), ' ', tostring(target), ' ', tostring(data), ' ', tostring(customDimensions)) | extend AgentName = extract(@'(claims-triage-agent|claims-decision-agent|tracing-test-agent)', 1, Payload) | where isnotempty(AgentName) | summarize AvgDurationMs = avg(duration) by bin(timestamp, 5m), AgentName | order by timestamp asc

union isfuzzy=true traces, requests, dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend Payload = strcat(tostring(message), ' ', tostring(name), ' ', tostring(target), ' ', tostring(data), ' ', tostring(customDimensions)) | extend AgentName = extract(@'(claims-triage-agent|claims-decision-agent|tracing-test-agent)', 1, Payload) | where isnotempty(AgentName) | summarize Invocations = count() by bin(timestamp, 15m), AgentName | order by timestamp asc

content.json:
## Claims, Decisions & Urgency
Every trace mapped back to a claim, with the agent decision and urgency it produced.

content.query: union isfuzzy=true traces, requests, dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend Payload = strcat(tostring(message), ' ', tostring(name), ' ', tostring(target), ' ', tostring(data), ' ', tostring(customDimensions)) | extend ClaimId = extract(@'(CLM-\d{3})', 1, Payload), AgentName = extract(@'(claims-triage-agent|claims-decision-agent|tracing-test-agent)', 1, Payload), Decision = extract(@'(APPROVE|REQUEST DOCUMENTS|INVESTIGATE|DENY)', 1, Payload), Urgency = extract(@'(IMMEDIATE|WITHIN 48H|STANDARD)', 1, Payload) | where isnotempty(ClaimId) | summarize TraceCount = count(), Operations = dcount(operation_Id), Agents = make_set_if(AgentName, isnotempty(AgentName)), Decision = take_anyif(Decision, isnotempty(Decision)), Urgency = take_anyif(Urgency, isnotempty(Urgency)), LastSeen = max(timestamp) by ClaimId | order by ClaimId asc

content.json:
## Decision & Urgency Distribution
How the agents are adjudicating across recent claims.

content.query: union isfuzzy=true traces, requests, dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend Payload = strcat(tostring(message), ' ', tostring(name), ' ', tostring(target), ' ', tostring(data), ' ', tostring(customDimensions)) | extend Decision = extract(@'(APPROVE|REQUEST DOCUMENTS|INVESTIGATE|DENY)', 1, Payload) | where isnotempty(Decision) | summarize Count = count() by Decision | order by Count desc

union isfuzzy=true traces, requests, dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend Payload = strcat(tostring(message), ' ', tostring(name), ' ', tostring(target), ' ', tostring(data), ' ', tostring(customDimensions)) | extend Urgency = extract(@'(IMMEDIATE|WITHIN 48H|STANDARD)', 1, Payload) | where isnotempty(Urgency) | summarize Count = count() by Urgency | order by Count desc

content.json:
## Claim Type Mix
Distribution of claim types flowing through the agents.

content.query: union isfuzzy=true traces, requests, dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend Payload = strcat(tostring(message), ' ', tostring(name), ' ', tostring(target), ' ', tostring(data), ' ', tostring(customDimensions)) | extend ClaimType = extract(@'(auto_collision|auto_theft|property_water_damage|property_fire)', 1, Payload) | where isnotempty(ClaimType) | summarize Count = count() by ClaimType | order by Count desc

content.json:
## Tool Call Health
Usage of the `assess_claim` function tool the agents call to score claim metrics against thresholds.

content.query: union isfuzzy=true traces, requests, dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend Payload = strcat(tostring(message), ' ', tostring(name), ' ', tostring(target), ' ', tostring(data), ' ', tostring(customDimensions)) | extend Tool = extract(@'(assess_claim)', 1, Payload) | where isnotempty(Tool) | extend DurationMs = todouble(column_ifexists('duration', real(null))) | summarize Calls = count(), Operations = dcount(operation_Id), AvgDurationMs = round(avg(DurationMs), 1), LastSeen = max(timestamp) by Tool | order by Calls desc

content.json:
## Errors & Failures
Failed dependencies, failed requests, and exceptions in the selected window. An empty table here is good news.

content.query: union isfuzzy=true (dependencies | where success == false), (requests | where success == false), exceptions | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend Payload = strcat(tostring(name), ' ', tostring(target), ' ', tostring(column_ifexists('outerMessage', '')), ' ', tostring(column_ifexists('problemId', '')), ' ', tostring(customDimensions)) | extend AgentName = extract(@'(claims-triage-agent|claims-decision-agent|tracing-test-agent)', 1, Payload), ClaimId = extract(@'(CLM-\d{3})', 1, Payload) | project timestamp, Type = itemType, AgentName, ClaimId, Problem = coalesce(tostring(column_ifexists('problemId', '')), tostring(column_ifexists('name', ''))), resultCode = column_ifexists('resultCode', '') | order by timestamp desc
